_note: Static tool rules + tombstone + FULL SCHEMA all active tables. Update ini kalau: (1) breaking change tool params, (2) tabel baru di-drop, (3) schema tabel berubah, (4) architecture berubah.

architecture.entry_point: core_main.py (v6.0 split architecture: core_config, core_github, core_train, core_tools, core_main). core_legacy.py = retired monolith (read-only reference).

state_files.SESSION.md: Dynamic: active tables, step status, next action — update every session
state_files.operating_context.json: Static: tool rules, full schema, tombstone tables — update only on structural change
state_files.CORE_SELF.md: Living self-knowledge — what CORE is, what it can do, how it works

key_endpoints.GET /state: Full system state (same as get_state MCP tool)
key_endpoints.POST /patch: Surgical file edit — {secret, path, old_str, new_str, message}

tool_rules.read_file: OMIT repo arg — default pockiesaints7/core-agi sudah benar
tool_rules.write_file: OMIT repo arg — default pockiesaints7/core-agi sudah benar. BLOCKED on core_main.py (guard active). For source edits use POST /patch from claude.ai or gh_search_replace from Desktop.
tool_rules.log_mistake: required: context, what_failed, fix. optional: domain, root_cause, how_to_avoid, severity
tool_rules.sb_insert: data harus valid JSON string. sessions required: summary(str), actions(array), interface(str)
tool_rules.add_knowledge: prefer over sb_insert untuk knowledge_base. required: topic, content. optional: domain, confidence, tags
tool_rules.sb_insert_hot_reflections: required: task_summary(str), domain(str), new_patterns(array), quality_score(float), reflection_text(str)
tool_rules.session_start: call at start of every Desktop session — replaces 4 separate calls
tool_rules.session_end: call at end of every Desktop session — replaces 2-3 calls
tool_rules.processed_by_cold: use eq.0/eq.1 (integer) in filters, NOT eq.true/eq.false

conventions.schema_check_before_insert: ALWAYS search KB 'CORE DB Schema [table]' OR sb_query limit=1 before first insert to any table in a new session
conventions.session_end: ALWAYS update SESSION.md if step/state changed

knowledge_base.purpose: Long-term knowledge store — domain expertise, SOPs, routing rules

mistakes.purpose: Error log — prevent repeat failures across sessions
mistakes.read_schema: id, context, what_failed, root_cause, correct_approach, tags, domain, how_to_avoid, severity

hot_reflections.purpose: Post-session learning capture — raw material for cold processor
hot_reflections.note: Cold processor polls for processed_by_cold=0 rows. Use integer 0/1 in querystring filters, NOT true/false.

cold_reflections.purpose: Distilled output of cold processor runs — read-only from Claude side
cold_reflections.read_schema: id, created_at, period_start, period_end, hot_count(int), patterns_found(int), evolutions_queued(int), auto_applied(int), summary_text(str)
cold_reflections.note: Never insert manually. Check here to verify cold processor ran.

evolution_queue.purpose: Proposed system changes pending owner approval
evolution_queue.insert_via: SYSTEM ONLY (cold_processor) or manual for explicit proposals
evolution_queue.read_schema: id, created_at, status(pending/synthesized/approved/rejected/applied), confidence, impact, reversible(bool), change_type, change_summary, diff_content, pattern_key, frequency, owner_notified(bool), applied_at
evolution_queue.synthesize_via: synthesize_evolutions tool — Claude reads all signals as architect, marks status=synthesized, writes blueprint to SESSION.md

pattern_frequency.purpose: Tracks how often a pattern appears across hot_reflections — drives evolution threshold
pattern_frequency.read_schema: id, pattern_key(str), domain(str), description(str), frequency(int), confidence(float), first_seen, last_seen, auto_applied(bool)

sessions.purpose: Session log — human-readable record of what happened each session

task_queue.read_schema: id(uuid), task(str), status(str), priority(int), result, error, created_at, updated_at, source, chat_id

projects.purpose: Registered projects CORE can index and answer questions about

project_context.purpose: Prepared project KB context waiting for Claude Desktop to consume
project_context.note: Rows consumed (deleted) after Claude Desktop loads them via project_consume

changelog.purpose: Permanent audit log of all system changes deployed to CORE
changelog.read_schema: id, version, change_type, component, title, description, triggered_by, growth_flag_type, before_state, after_state, files_changed(array), session_id, created_at

when_table_added: Add to active_tables in this file
when_table_dropped: Add KB entry marking table as tombstone
Remove from all queries in core.py
when_schema_changes: Update schema in this file under active_tables
Update KB entry for that table
Add migration note in core.py fix log

_tombstone_note: Tabel ini sudah dihapus permanen. JANGAN query. Kalau ada tabel baru yang di-drop, append ke list ini + update KB.
